  • Exports

Statically typed wrapper on top of graphviz node description format.

Large portions of documentation copied from original site and added to relevant places.

Imports

helpers, html_ast, hprimitives, colorstring, halgorithm, hshell, oswrap

Types

DotPortPosition = enum
  dppNone = "", dppTop = "n", dppBotton = "s", dppTopLeft = "nw", dppLeft = "w",
  dppBottomLeft = "sw", dppTopRight = "ne", dppRight = "e",
  dppBottonRight = "se"
DotNodeId = object
  path: seq[int]
  record: seq[int]
  port: DotPortPosition

DotNodeShape = enum
  nsaDefault = "",          ## No shape specified
  nsaRecord = "record",     ## Record node
  nsaMRecord = "Mrecord", nsaAssembly = "assembly", nsaBox = "box",
  nsaBox3d = "box3d", nsaCds = "cds", nsaCircle = "circle",
  nsaComponent = "component", nsaCylinder = "cylinder", nsaDiamond = "diamond",
  nsaDoublecircle = "doublecircle", nsaDoubleoctagon = "doubleoctagon",
  nsaEgg = "egg", nsaEllipse = "ellipse", nsaFivepoverhang = "fivepoverhang",
  nsaFolder = "folder", nsaHexagon = "hexagon", nsaHouse = "house",
  nsaInsulator = "insulator", nsaInvhouse = "invhouse",
  nsaInvtrapezium = "invtrapezium", nsaInvtriangle = "invtriangle",
  nsaLarrow = "larrow", nsaLpromoter = "lpromoter", nsaMcircle = "Mcircle",
  nsaMdiamond = "Mdiamond", nsaMsquare = "Msquare", nsaNone = "none",
  nsaNote = "note", nsaNoverhang = "noverhang", nsaOctagon = "octagon",
  nsaOval = "oval", nsaParallelogram = "parallelogram",
  nsaPentagon = "pentagon", nsaPlain = "plain", nsaPlaintext = "plaintext",
  nsaPoint = "point", nsaPolygon = "polygon", nsaPrimersite = "primersite",
  nsaPromoter = "promoter", nsaProteasesite = "proteasesite",
  nsaProteinstab = "proteinstab", nsaRarrow = "rarrow", nsaRect = "rect",
  nsaRectangle = "rectangle", nsaRestrictionsite = "restrictionsite",
  nsaRibosite = "ribosite", nsaRnastab = "rnastab", nsaRpromoter = "rpromoter",
  nsaSeptagon = "septagon", nsaSignature = "signature", nsaSquare = "square",
  nsaStar = "star", nsaTab = "tab", nsaTerminator = "terminator",
  nsaThreepoverhang = "threepoverhang", nsaTrapezium = "trapezium",
  nsaTriangle = "triangle", nsaTripleoctagon = "tripleoctagon",
  nsaUnderline = "underline", nsaUtr = "utr"
DotNodeStyle = enum
  nstDefault = "",          ## No explicitly specified style
  nstFilled = "filled", nstInvisible = "invisible", nstDiagonals = "diagonals",
  nstRounded = "rounded", nstDashed = "dashed", nstDotted = "dotted",
  nstSolid = "solid", nstBold = "bold", nstWedged = "wedged",
  nstStriped = "filled"
The style attribute can be used to modify the appearance of a node. 
DotNodeLabelAlign = enum
  nlaDefault = "\\n", nlaLeft = "\\l", nlaCenter = "\\n", nlaRight = "\\r"
DotEdgeStyle = enum
  edsDefault = "", edsSolid = "solid", edsDotted = "dotted",
  edsDashed = "dashed", edsBold = "bold", edsInvis = "invis",
  edsTapered = "tapered"
DotSplineStyle = enum
  spsDefault = "", spsOrtho = "ortho", spsNone = "none", spsLine = "line",
  spsPolyline = "polyline", spsCurved = "curved", spsSplines = "spline"
ClusterStyles = enum
  clsDefault = "", clsSolid = "solid", clsDashed = "dashed",
  clsStriped = "striped", clsDotted = "dotted", clsBold = "bold",
  clsRounded = "rounded", clsFilled = "filled"
RecordField = object
  id*: DotNodeId             ## Record field id
  text*: string              ## Text in record field
  vertical*: bool            ## Orientation direction
  subfields*: seq[RecordField]

DotNode = object
  id*: DotNodeId
  width*: float
  height*: float
  fontname*: string
  penwidth*: Option[float]
  case style*: DotNodeStyle
  of nstStriped, nstWedged:
      colorList*: seq[tuple[color: Color, weight: Option[float]]] ## Weighted color values
      gradientAngle*: int
      isRadial*: bool        ## Two fill styles: linear and radial.
    
  else:
      color*: Option[Color]  ## DotNode color
      fillcolor*: Option[Color]

  labelAlign*: DotNodeLabelAlign
  case shape*: DotNodeShape
  of nsaRecord, nsaMRecord:
      flds*: seq[RecordField]

  of nsaPlaintext:
      htmlLabel*: HtmlElem

  else:
      labelLeftPad*: string
      label*: Option[string] ## DotNode label

Fields

colorListp: Type of color filling

If true - use color list: sequence of weighted color values. Total weight should summ up to 1. Each value is in range [0; 1]. If no values specified gradient will be soft. If the colorList value specifies multiple colors, with no weights, and a filled style is specified, a linear gradient fill is done using the first two colors. If weights are present, a degenerate linear gradient fill is done. This essentially does a fill using two colors, with the weights specifying how much of region is filled with each color.

Arrow = object
  shapes*: seq[tuple[modifs: ArrowShapeModifier, shape: ArrowShape, isOpen: bool]] ## Arrow shapes [1]

Fields

shapes: Arrow shapes

Multiple arrow shapes can be used for a single node. Subsequent arrow shapes, if specified, occur further from the node.

shape: Left/right or non-clipped
isOpen: Filled or not filled
DotEdge = object
  lhead*: Option[string]
  rhead*: Option[string]
  ltail*: Option[string]
  rtail*: Option[string]
  fontname*: string
  style*: DotEdgeStyle
  arrowSpec*: Arrow
  src*: DotNodeId
  to*: seq[DotNodeId]
  color*: Color
  weight*: Option[float]
  minlen*: Option[float]
  label*: Option[string]

DotGraphPresets = enum
  dgpAutomata, dgpAutomataAccept, dgpRecords
DotGraphNodeRank = enum
  gnrDefault = "", gnrSame = "same"
DotGraphRankDir = enum
  grdDefault = "", grdTopBottom = "TB", grdLeftRight = "LR"
DotGraph = object
  compound*: Option[bool]    ## If true, allow edges between clusters. Must
                             ## be specified if `lhead` or `ltais` is used
  rankdir*: DotGraphRankDir
  styleNode*: DotNode
  styleEdge*: DotEdge
  topNodes*: seq[DotNode]
  attrs*: Table[string, string]
  ranksep*: Option[float]
  noderank*: DotGraphNodeRank
  isUndirected*: bool
  name*: string
  isCluster*: bool
  isWrapper*: bool
  idshift*: int
  label*: string
  labelOnBottom*: bool
  fontsize*: int
  fontcolor*: Color
  fontname*: string
  color*: Option[Color]
  splines*: DotSplineStyle
  subgraphs*: seq[DotGraph]
  nodes*: seq[DotNode]
  edges*: seq[DotEdge]
  recordIds*: HashSet[DotNodeId]
  bgColor*: Option[Color]

Consts

defaultDotBackgroundMap: array[BackgroundColor, Color] = [0, 9849979, 7659460,
    16769633, 3369593, 11764165, 7175818, 16777215, 0, -1]
defaultDotForegroundMap: array[ForegroundColor, Color] = [0, 9849979, 7659460,
    16769633, 3369593, 11764165, 7175818, 16777215, 0, -1]
lightDotForegroundMap: array[ForegroundColor, Color] = [0, 15374745, 11982760,
    16770457, 10470888, 14001853, 10797812, 16777215, 0, -1]
brightDotForegroundMap: array[ForegroundColor, Color] = [0, 16711680, 65280,
    16776960, 255, 16711935, 65535, 16777215, 0, -1]

Procs

proc `$`(graph: DotGraph): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError, Exception],
                                    tags: [RootEffect].}
proc toPng(graph: DotGraph; resfile: AbsFile; resolution: int = 300;
           tmpfile: AbsFile = getAppTempFile("dotTmpFile.dot");
           tmpimage: AbsFile = getAPpTempFile("dotTmpImage.png")): void {...}{.raises: [
    IOError, ValueError, Exception, ArgumentError, OSError, Exception,
    ValueError, PathError, IOError], tags: [WriteIOEffect, RootEffect,
    ShellExecEffect, ExecIOEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect].}
Generate file from graph 
proc toXDot(graph: DotGraph; resfile: AbsFile;
            tmpfile: AbsFile = AbsFile "/tmp/dot-file.dot"): void {...}{.raises: [
    IOError, ValueError, Exception, ArgumentError, OSError, ShellError], tags: [
    WriteIOEffect, RootEffect, ShellExecEffect, ExecIOEffect, ReadEnvEffect].}
Generate file from graph 
proc toPng(graph: DotGraph; resfile: string; resolution: int = 300;
           tmpfile: string = "/tmp/dot-file.dot";
           tmpimage: string = "/tmp/dot-image-tmp.png"): void {...}{.deprecated, raises: [
    IOError, ValueError, Exception, ArgumentError, OSError, PathError], tags: [
    WriteIOEffect, RootEffect, ShellExecEffect, ExecIOEffect, ReadEnvEffect,
    ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect].}
Deprecated

Funcs

func hash(id: DotNodeId): Hash {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

func toDotPath(top: int; sub: int; port: DotPortPosition = dppNone): DotNodeId {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func toDotPath(top, sub: DotNodeId; port: DotPortPosition = dppNone): DotNodeId {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func addIdShift(node: DotNodeId; shift: int): DotNodeId {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func addRecord(node: DotNodeId; rec: int): DotNodeId {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func quoteGraphviz(str: string): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func escapeHtmlGraphviz(str: string): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

func makeRectConsolasEdge(): DotEdge {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeCircleConsolasNode(): DotNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeDotNode(style: DotGraphPresets): DotNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeDotEdge(style: DotGraphPresets): DotEdge {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeDotEdge(style: DotEdgeStyle): DotEdge {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func setProps(node: sink DotNode; id: DotNodeId; label: string): DotNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeDotGraph(name: string = "G"; nodes: seq[DotNode] = @[];
                  edges: seq[DotEdge] = @[];
                  styleNode: DotNode = makeRectConsolasNode();
                  styleEdge: DotEdge = makeRectConsolasEdge()): DotGraph {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeDotGraph(style: DotGraphPresets; name: string = "G"): DotGraph {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func add(graph: var DotGraph; node: DotNode): void {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func add(graph: var DotGraph; sub: DotGraph): void {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func addSubgraph(graph: var DotGraph; subg: DotGraph) {...}{.
    deprecated: "Use `HGraph.add` instead", raises: [], tags: [].}
Deprecated: Use `HGraph.add` instead 
func add(graph: var DotGraph; edge: DotEdge): void {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

    tags: [].}

    tags: [].}
Deprecated

    tags: [].}

func applyStyle(to: var DotNode; source: DotNode): void {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeConstraintEdge(idFrom, idTo: DotNodeId): DotEdge {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeDotNode(id: DotNodeId; label: string; shape: DotNodeShape = nsaDefault;
                 color: Color = colNoColor; style: DotNodeStyle = nstDefault;
                 width: float = -1.0; height: float = -1.0;
                 fillcolor: Color = colNoColor): DotNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeDotNode(id: DotNodeId; text: RawHtml): DotNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeDotNode(id: DotNodeId; html: HtmlElem): DotNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func add(node: var DotNode; other: DotNode;
         attrs: openArray[(string, string)] = @[]) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func dotColor(col: ForegroundColor;
              map: array[ForegroundColor, Color] = defaultDotForegroundMap): Color {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeHtmlDotNodeContents(cellItems: seq[HtmlElem]; tableAttrs: openArray[
    (string, string)] = {"border": "1"}; cellAttrs: openArray[(string, string)] = {
    "balign": "left", "border": "0"}): HtmlElem {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeDotNode(id: DotNodeId; label: string; fg: ForegroundColor;
                 bg: BackgroundColor; bgColorMap: array[BackgroundColor, Color] = defaultDotBackgroundMap;
    fgColorMap: array[ForegroundColor, Color] = defaultDotForegroundMap): DotNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeDotRecord(id: DotNodeId; text: string;
                   subfields: seq[RecordField] = @[]): RecordField {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
func makeRecordDotNode(id: DotNodeId; records: seq[RecordField]): DotNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func add(node: var DotNode; field: RecordField) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func makeColoredDotNode(id: DotNodeId; label: string; tableAttrs: openArray[
    (string, string)] = {"border": "1"}; cellAttrs: openArray[(string, string)] = {
    "balign": "left", "border": "0"}; style: DotNodeStyle = nstDefault): DotNode {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
Create graphviz with colored note text. label is allowed to contain terminal ANSI SGR control codes like e[32 
func makeTableDotNode(id: DotNodeId; label: RawHtml | string; tableAttrs: openArray[
    (string, string)] = {"border": "1"}; cellAttrs: openArray[(string, string)] = {
    "balign": "left", "border": "0"}; style: DotNodeStyle = nstDefault): DotNode
